name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M83353 [Premium Enhanced Version] The leather is Grade A rhombus leather from an authentic Italian factory, with a counter-synced chip. It focuses on quality, all-steel hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, and oiling. It is an A-grade high-quality product with a comprehensive upgrade. The photos match the product, including the full packaging. Dimensions: 17*12*9.5CM
